---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a focused improvement to the skill workflow, packaging, examples, or maintenance tooling.
title: '[Feature]: '
labels: ['enhancement']
---

## Problem
Describe the gap or friction.

## Proposed Improvement
Describe the smallest useful improvement.

## Why It Matters
Explain the user or maintainer benefit.

## Scope Notes
Call out anything that should remain out of scope.
